mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 0 ORDER BY m.sort

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 0 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0 AND menu_type IN (0, 1) ORDER BY sort
SELECT DISTINCT permission FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0 AND permission IS NOT NULL AND permission != ''
